trigger: Remote Claude Code stuck (pid 354342) + violating repo changes + wrong CC settings

fixes_applied.fix_1: Killed stuck Claude Code process (pid 354342): Agent tool called with invalid subagent_type='code', then general-purpose subagent ran 40+ min without completing
fixes_applied.fix_2: Reverted violating repo changes: previous CC session changed dsv4p_uni41002→42001, postgres:16→14, memory 512M→128M, LiteLLM image version — all against CLAUDE.md constraints. Reverted via git checkout --
fixes_applied.fix_3: Updated contextWindow from 190000 to 120000. Reason: GLM-5.1 real capacity = 128K (131072 tokens, confirmed by ZhipuAI docs + ModelScope). 190000 exceeded model capacity, causing errors before auto-compact triggered. 120000 ≈ 91% of 131K, leaves ~11K headroom
fixes_applied.fix_4: Updated CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS from 32768 to 8192. Reason: model caps at ~4-8K internally. 32768 wasted quota on impossible requests. 8192 gives room for longer responses within model's actual capability
fixes_applied.fix_5: Added autoCompactWindow='auto'. Reason: Claude Code v2.1.158 feature. Actual threshold = min(auto, contextWindow). Previously missing = no explicit config
fixes_applied.fix_6: Created ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh on opc2_uname: displays model name + token counts + context usage % in TUI bottom bar
fixes_applied.fix_7: Added statusLine config to settings.json: {type:command, command:bash ~/.claude/statusline-command.sh}
fixes_applied.fix_8: Installed jq on opc2_uname (required for statusline script)
fixes_applied.fix_9: Restarted Claude Code on remote in tmux session cc_repair_self

documentation_sources.glm51_context_window: ZhipuAI open.bigmodel.cn API docs, ModelScope model card: 128K (131072 tokens)
documentation_sources.auto_compact: Claude Code v2.1.158 binary: autoCompactWindow setting + CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW env var. Threshold = min(autoCompactWindow, contextWindow)
documentation_sources.statusLine: Claude Code v2.1.158 binary: statusLine command receives JSON via stdin with model.id/display_name, context_window.total_input_tokens, context_window.context_window_size, context_window.used_percentage

optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_1: Monitor auto-compact behavior: verify it triggers at ~120K tokens instead of causing errors
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_2: Monitor statusLine display accuracy: context_window_size shows 200000 (model API-reported), not settings.json contextWindow=120000 — verify CC uses min(auto, 120K) correctly
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_3: Monitor latency per variant and validate latency-based-routing effectiveness
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_4: Compare error rates before/after contextWindow fix — fewer truncation errors expected
optimization_targets_for_next_round.target_5: Collect real usage data on MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=8192: verify model actually produces responses >4096 tokens when needed
